vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing loading into fuselage structure.
Dissipates heat generated by avionics equipment.
Supports nacelle tilt mechanism.
Provides optical access for belly camera.

integration_opportunities.description: Integrate nacelle mounts with fuselage spine for structural integrity.
Enhance avionics bay cooling with additional ventilation channels.
Ensure easy access to camera module through belly camera window.

manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual and tactile inspection for fit and finish

verification_focus.description: Verify structural integrity under wing loading.
Test thermal dissipation in avionics bay.
Check interface clearances for proper fit.

risk.mit: Review and adjust clearance values to ensure smooth operation

risk.desc: Possible difficulty in accessing service ports for maintenance
risk.mit: Increase size of service access covers and improve labeling

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure

physics_paths.description: Load from nacelle and V-tail transferred through wing spars to fuselage spine
Airflow over wing surface generating lift
Heat dissipation from wing surface to ambient air
Motion of wing during flight and landing
Pressure distribution on wing surface due to airflow

integration_opportunities.description: Optimize wing spar thickness for weight reduction while maintaining strength
Refine wing profile for improved lift-to-drag ratio
Improve access to wing components for maintenance

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and spar sockets
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures for FDM, orientation for CNC
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for alignment and fit, dimensional checks

verification_focus.description: Verify total mass of wing does not exceed 10kg
Ensure wing can withstand specified aerodynamic and structural loads
Check all interfaces for proper clearance and fit

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment if bearing seats are not precisely manufactured.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances for bearing seats.

physics_paths.description: Load from wing structure transferred through bearing seat to rotor hub.
Rotation of tilt axis driven by servo motor through worm gear.
Power supply from battery pack to motor and electronic speed controller.

Check servo linkage does not interfere with nacelle rotation.
Ensure motor and ESC fit within designated pocket.
